Yesterday I went for a walk. The dog chased a squirrel. We laughed so hard! Then it started raining and we ran home soaking wet.
I dunno, maybe? Well, listen — when I went there I saw this tall guy with a small dog. He looked at me funny. I waved. He left.
Coffee was cold. Bus was late. Boss yelled. Same Monday as always. But the sandwich at lunch made up for it — perfect mustard ratio.
Funny thing: my cat figured out how to open the fridge. Tried hiding the treats. She just looks at me like I'm the idiot now.
We took the back road through the hills. Saw three deer. Got lost twice. Best detour of the summer, honestly.
